mapper.sql: id, dic_type_id, dic_type_name, dic_key, dic_value, status
mapper.insert:
insert into t_dictionary
id,
dic_type_id,
dic_type_name,
dic_key,
dic_value,
status,
#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{dicTypeId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{dicTypeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{dicKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{dicValue,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{status,jdbcType=INTEGER},
mapper.update:
update t_dictionary
dic_type_id = #{dicTypeId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
dic_type_name = #{dicTypeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
dic_key = #{dicKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
dic_value = #{dicValue,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
status = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update t_dictionary set dic_type_id = #{dicTypeId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, dic_type_name = #{dicTypeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, dic_key = #{dicKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, dic_value = #{dicValue,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.select:
select count(*) from t_dictionary
dic_type_id = #{model.dicTypeId}
dic_type_name like CONCAT("%", #{model.dicTypeName}, "%")
and dic_key like CONCAT("%", #{model.dicKey}, "%")
and dic_value like CONCAT("%", #{model.dicValue}, "%")
and status = #{model.status}
and ( dic_type_name like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or dic_key like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or dic_value like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )
select from t_dictionary where dic_type_id = #{dicTypeId,jdbcType=INTEGER} order by dic_key
